//: Tells Node to treat .js files in this directory as CommonJS, regardless of the parent web/ package.json's type:module. Still needed because the HarmonyPIR Emscripten loaders (harmonypir*/onionpir_client.js variants when added) keep emitting CommonJS module.exports = ... — node tests read them via require(). Post-port (commit 7), OnionPIR moved from .js (CommonJS) to .mjs (ES module); the leakage-diff test now dynamic-imports the .mjs as a file:// URL and is unaffected by this CommonJS hint. Vite serves the public/ tree verbatim and ignores this file at bundle time, so production is unaffected.
